title: Perfect Blue
tmdbOverview: Rising pop star Mima Kirigoe quits singing to pursue a career as an actress. After she takes up a role on a popular detective show, her handlers and collaborators begin turning up murdered. Harboring feelings of guilt and haunted by visions of her former self, Mima's reality and fantasy meld into a frenzied paranoia.
synopsis: Perfect Blue (1998) is a animation and thriller film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
